education.area: Computer Science; Advisor: Prof. Tianyi Zhang

publications.name: Enhancing Multi-Agent Communication through Attention Steering with Context Relevance
publications.summary: Training-free context management for multi-agent systems with attention steering and temporal/spatial decay.

publications.name: FLARE: Fine-Grained Diagnostic Feedback for LLM Code Refinement
publications.summary: Efficient code refinement with a lightweight line-level fault localizer and test-time scaling.

publications.name: Attention-Aligned Reasoning for Large Language Models
publications.summary: Reasoning-time attention alignment and prompt engineering for keeping LLMs focused on prompts and intermediate goals.

publications.name: Active Layer-Contrastive Decoding Reduces Hallucination in Large Language Model Generation
publications.summary: RL-guided layer-contrastive decoding for reducing hallucinations in large language model generation.

publications.name: LLAMAFUZZ: Large Language Model Enhanced Greybox Fuzzing
publications.summary: LLM-enhanced greybox fuzzing that learns structured input formats and mutation strategies.

publications.name: SteerDiff: Steering towards Safe Text-to-Image Diffusion Models
publications.summary: Safe generative AI through lightweight prompt steering for text-to-image diffusion models.
